calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-19-2011 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235

Petitioner AICHAN ZHANG (Mother) was present in pro per as PARENT TO MINORS JIALE ZHANG & XINLE ZHANG.

PETITIONER SEEKS TO CHANGE HER NAME AS WELL.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to AARON JIA LE ZHANG & TIMOTHY XIN LE ZHANG.

THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF MOTHER TO WINNIE AI CHAN ZHANG.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
